steps.title: Find the combined percentage
steps.content:
An item must be blue, triangular, and plastic. Multiply the three percentages in sequence:
$$
0.36\cdot 0.40\cdot 0.45=0.0648
$$
So $6.48\%$ of the items are triangular blue plastic items.

steps.title: Find the complement
steps.content: The question asks for the percentage that are not triangular blue plastic items: $$ 100\%-6.48\%=93.52\% $$ The answer is C.
